hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-f"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected. Ask the user for confirmation first." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push.*main|git\s+push.*master"; then echo "WARNING: Pushing to main/master branch. Confirm this is intentional." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.env\.local$|\.env\.production$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot write to .env files — secrets must be managed manually." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "firestore\.rules|server\.ts|src/config/admin\.ts"; then echo "WARNING: Editing high-risk file ($FILE). Proceed with care — run /firebase-check or /stripe-flow after." >&2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$"; then cd "c:/Users/admin/Downloads/TRAVELLINIWITHUS-codex-local-import-20260408" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$"; then cd "c:/Users/admin/Downloads/TRAVELLINIWITHUS-codex-local-import-20260408" && npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -15; fi'
